series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans
series_metadata.series_description: The Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans are records related to the protection and reestablishment of data processing services, equipment and data (back-up files) in case of a disaster. The Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans are stored offsite.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Review twice a year in May and October when disaster recovery testing is performed, revise as needed and return to offsite storage at Fireproof. Retain until superseded by revised plan, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Review twice a year in May and October when disaster recovery testing is performed, revise as needed and return to offsite storage at Fireproof. Retain until superseded by revised plan, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
